children.heading: Payments
children.label: a Payments
children.text: From the allotment of each State for a fiscal year under , the State shall be paid the Federal share of the expenditures incurred during such year under its State plan approved under . Such payments may be made (after necessary adjustments on account of previously made overpayments or underpayments) in advance or by way of reimbursement, and in such installments and on such conditions as the Administrator may determine.section 796e of this titlesection 796d–1 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Federal share with respect to any State for any fiscal year shall be 90 percent of the expenditures incurred by the State during such year under its State plan approved under .section 796d–1 of this title

children.heading: Non-Federal share
children.label: 2 Non-Federal share
children.text: The non-Federal share of the cost of any project that receives assistance through an allotment under this subpart may be provided in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services.
